title: Darth Tater
content:
{{Top|inf|ncl}}
{{Noncanon|legends=1}}
[[File:DarthTater-TBRCM.jpg|thumb|Tag with his Darth Tater.]]
'''Darth Tater''' was a version of [[Wikipedia:Mr. Potato Head|Mr. Potato Head]], made to look like [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. [[Tag Greenley/Legends|Tag Greenley]] owned such a toy when he was still a baby. Bink's parents discovered his [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensibility]] when he let his toy float in the air. He was born on "Potatooine."

==Behind the scenes==
[[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Potato/Legends|Tater]] originally was a [[Wikia:c:swmerchandise:Darth Tater|real-life toy]] released by [[Hasbro Inc.|Hasbro]] in February [[2005]]. He came complete with lightsaber, cape, helmet, shoes, eyes, nose, and teeth. He retailed for $7.99 US.

==Appearances==
[[File:Darthtater.jpg|thumb|Darth Tater]]
*''[[Tag & Bink: Revenge of the Clone Menace]]''
